session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report all results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target from repository root

session.assistant:
All checks in `make fast-ci` passed successfully. Here's the summary:
**Linting:** All checks passed
**Format Check:** 1729 files already formatted
**Prettier Check:** All matched files use Prettier code style
**Markdown Check:** OK
**Exec Reference Check:** .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
**Type Checking (ty):** All checks passed
**Unit Tests (erk):** 6020 passed in 14.68s
**Tests (erk-dev):** 136 passed in 6.16s
**Tests (erk-statusline):** 115 passed in 0.82s
**Tests (erk-mcp):** 28 passed
**CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md Standard:** PASSED - 19 CLAUDE.md files checked - 0 violations
The entire fast-ci suite completed successfully with no errors or failures.
